summary: Default web/client map now uses a topology-backed projection with district polygons, route nodes, explicit route edges, path preview edge sequences, topology hash, and localized reason-code copy. The renderer draws only read-model polygons/polylines and no longer falls back from empty route polylines to district anchors. Default situation overlay is selection/path-preview scoped; full route view remains opt-in via routes mode.
commit: HEAD 26f68044; working tree contains uncommitted review changes

tests_run.result: Listed modified client/map/ui/tests files plus generated topology screenshots.
1 file, 9 tests passed, including topology anti-grid renderer/projection cases.
1 file, 11 tests passed, including topology default shell and no-known/blocked preview copy.
Vite web build succeeded; existing large chunk warnings only.
Storybook build succeeded; existing Vite chunk/plugin timing warnings only.
30 Playwright tests passed; generated required 1440x900 and 1280x720 topology screenshots.
format, lint, typecheck, and architecture boundaries passed.

decisions: Added client-core topology-facing projection and fixture shaped like accepted topology/path-preview read models; no protocol, sim-core, save-format, or content-source edits.
Default web shell now uses createM7TopologyClientReadModelSnapshot instead of createM2PrototypeClientReadModelSnapshot.
Route render instructions only consume read-model route.points; M6 candidate fallback from empty route polyline to district anchors was removed.
Situation-mode route overlay is scoped to selected district endpoints and path-preview marked routeIds; routes mode remains the explicit full-route opt-in.

Inspector route preview displays player-localized edge sequence, mode, estimated days, bottleneck capacity, seasonal variation, no-known/blocked/capacity reasons, and route mode/terrain/risk reason chips.
risks: Topology fixture is client-side projection coverage over accepted surfaces, not a direct runtime query subscription yet; systems_architect should confirm final wiring target for live query transport.
E2E regenerated existing M7 systemic interaction screenshot PNGs while producing the new topology evidence images.
Legacy M2 prototype fixture remains in client-core for existing tests, but is no longer the default player map path.
requested_action: Review anti-grid client topology implementation, validate allowed-scope compliance, and route to test_engineer/qa_reviewer after architecture review.
